title: One of a Kind

startPoint.en: Talk to Mr Mordaut in his office under the stairs in Varrock Museum. (via → )
startPoint.es: Habla con Mr Mordaut en su oficina bajo las escaleras del Varrock Museum. (via →)

children.title: Ability to enter the Warriors' Guild
A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen
A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains…
children.matchTitle: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains

items.name: Ghostspeak amulet
items.display: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet (unless the hard Morytania achievements have been completed)

items.name: Coins
items.display: 875 coins to enter Brimhaven Dungeon (unless the hard Karamja achievements have been completed)

recommended.name: Ectophial
recommended.display: Ectophial and Remora's necklace for quick teleportation, as well as Dungeoneering cape, Hoardstalker ring or Big Book o' Piracy

recommended.name: Metallic dragon trinkets
recommended.display: 5 metallic dragon trinkets for teleport to steel or iron dragons

recommended.name: Dragonfire
recommended.display: Any method of protection from dragonfire

recommended.name: Law altar teleport
recommended.display: Law altar teleport for faster access to Entrana

kills: Must be able to survive attacks from a celestial dragon (level 127)

rewards.name: Dragontooth Island resource dungeon
rewards.display: Access to the Dragontooth Island resource dungeon, containing celestial dragons
Rotate all four mysterious statues during or after the quest to gain 10,000 bonus experience in a skill of choice

rewards.name: Dragon-hunter archer
rewards.display: The dragon-hunters (archer, mage, and warrior) and Echo of Jas can be faced in the Dominion Tower
If Ritual of the Mahjarrat has been completed, speak to the Submerged Statue on Entrana again to receive 25,000 bonus experience in any non-elite skill (12,500 if elite)

rewards.name: Adamant dragon dungeon
rewards.display: The ability to translate murals in the Adamant dragon dungeon and on Mount Firewake with the Dragonkin Primer

rewards.name: Contemplation
rewards.display: Contemplation (in Robert's library, if not already unlocked during Curse of the Black Stone)

rewards.name: Awoken
rewards.display: Awoken (only if you had not previously entered the Queen Black Dragon's lair)

rewards.name: Queen Black Dragon (music track)
rewards.display: Queen Black Dragon (only if you had not previously entered the Queen Black Dragon's lair)

text.en: 2 backpack spaces

steps.caption: The door that leads to basement with Mr. Mordaut, right behind the first flight of stairs

text.en: Talk to Mr. Mordaut in his office in the basement of Varrock Museum that is accessed behind the stairs.
text.es: Habla con Mr. Mordaut en su oficina, en el sótano del Varrock Museum, a la que se accede por detrás de las escaleras.

text.en: Read the book Hannibus Hunted.
text.es: Lee el libro Hannibus Hunted.

text.en: Talk to Mr. Mordaut.
text.es: Habla con Mr. Mordaut.

text.en: Catspeak amulet (e)

Locate Bob the Cat with the catspeak amulet. An easy method to locate him is to hop worlds at the west Varrock anvils or searching nearby the Burthorpe lodestone. Most of the time he is inside Carwen Essencebinder Magical Runes Shop
text.es: Localiza a Bob the Cat con el amuleto de habla felina. Un método fácil es cambiar de mundo en los yunques al oeste de Varrock o buscar cerca de la piedra de viaje de Burthorpe. La mayoría de las veces está dentro de la tienda Carwen Essencebinder Magical Runes Shop.

text.en: Talk to Bob.
text.es: Habla con Bob.

chatOptions: 2 Maybe I'll check out this house...

text.en: Travel to Unferth's house east of Burthorpe lodestone.
text.es: Viaja a la casa de Unferth, al este de la piedra de viaje de Burthorpe.

text.en: Talk to Unferth.
text.es: Habla con Unferth.

chatOptions: 1 I want to search your house for a hidden library.
3 I'm not interested in your novels.
1 I'm looking for the lost library of Robert the Strong.
1 Is there any place that Bob the Cat seemed drawn to?

text.en: Search the bookcase.
text.es: Registra la estantería.

text.en: Investigate the fireplace.
text.es: Investiga la chimenea.

text.en: Inspect the table.
text.es: Inspecciona la mesa.

text.en: Remove the carpet.
text.es: Quita la alfombra.

text.en: Enter the trapdoor.
text.es: Entra por la trampilla.

text.en: Emerald
Search the desk in the centre of the room.
text.es: Registra el escritorio en el centro de la sala.

text.en: Investigate the weapon rack to the north.
text.es: Investiga el armero al norte.

chatOptions: 1 Take some rust from the weapons.

text.en: Use iron oxide on emerald to get Animate Rock scroll.
text.es: Usa el óxido de hierro en la esmeralda para obtener el pergamino Animate Rock.

text.en: Read the Animate Rock scroll by the statue to the south.
text.es: Lee el pergamino Animate Rock junto a la estatua al sur.

text.en: Talk to Hannibus.
text.es: Habla con Hannibus.

chatOptions: 4 We could look around this library!

text.en: Search the bookcase for the Dragonkin Primer to the east and Flight of the Dragonkin to the west.
text.es: Registra la estantería en busca del Dragonkin Primer al este y de Flight of the Dragonkin al oeste.

text.en: Click the map in the south of the room to update location names
text.es: Haz clic en el mapa al sur de la sala para actualizar los nombres de las ubicaciones.

text.en: Animate Rock scroll
Portable fairy ring or Ardougne cloak and a law altar teleport
Head to the mysterious statue east of the Seers' Village bank.
text.es: Dirígete a la misteriosa estatua al este del banco de Seers' Village.

text.en: Read the Animate Rock scroll by it.
text.es: Lee el pergamino Animate Rock junto a ella.

text.en: Repeat for the next 3 statues. Rotating all 4 statues gives access to 10,000 bonus experience in any skill. At least one is required to continue.
text.es: Repite el proceso con las siguientes 3 estatuas. Girar las 4 estatuas te da acceso a 10.000 puntos de experiencia extra en cualquier habilidad. Se necesita al menos una para continuar.

text.en: North-west of the Karamja lodestone.
text.es: Al noroeste de la piedra de viaje de Karamja.

chatOptions: 1 Just tell me how to rotate you.

text.en: North-west of the Ardougne lodestone.
text.es: Al noroeste de la piedra de viaje de Ardougne.

chatOptions: 1 Just tell me how to rotate you.

text.en: North of the Tower of Life (fairy ring DJP, Ardougne cloak for east of Kandarin Monastery, or Kandarin Monastery Teleport).
text.es: Al norte de la Tower of Life (anillo de las hadas DJP, capa de Ardougne para ir al este del Kandarin Monastery, o teleporte al Kandarin Monastery).

chatOptions: 1 Just tell me how to rotate you.

text.en: Travel to the north-west corner of Entrana.
text.es: Viaja a la esquina noroeste de Entrana.

text.en: Read the animate rock scroll by the submerged statue.
text.es: Lee el pergamino Animate Rock junto a la estatua sumergida.

chatOptions: 3 Do you know of a way to travel between worlds?

text.en: Dragonkin Primer
Wilderness sword 2
Run to the green dragons in the south east corner of the Forinthry Dungeon. Hannibus will talk to you if you brought the Dragonkin Primer book.
text.es: Corre hacia los dragones verdes en la esquina sureste del Forinthry Dungeon. Hannibus hablará contigo si has traído el libro Dragonkin Primer.

text.en: This dungeon is located in the Wilderness, so make sure that you are not opted in to PvP combat by talking to Vala.
text.es: Esta mazmorra está situada en el Wilderness, así que asegúrate de no tener activado el combate JcJ hablando con Vala.

text.en: A quick method is to use the Wilderness sword 2 teleport to the dungeon, or run east to the Wilderness Crater lodestone and run straight west to the dungeon entrance.
text.es: Un método rápido es usar el teleporte Wilderness sword 2 hasta la mazmorra, o correr hacia el este hasta la piedra de viaje de Wilderness Crater y luego correr en línea recta hacia el oeste hasta la entrada de la mazmorra.

text.en: If you don't see Hannibus, exit the dungeon and re-enter it, then run towards green dragons, it will give you an option to continue the quest. Make sure you brought the Dragonkin Primer book.
text.es: Si no ves a Hannibus, sal de la mazmorra y vuelve a entrar, luego corre hacia los dragones verdes; te dará la opción de continuar la misión. Asegúrate de haber traído el libro Dragonkin Primer.

text.en: Run close to the east wall of the room, near the lava.
text.es: Corre cerca de la pared este de la sala, junto a la lava.

text.en: Study the rock (on the ground east of the green dragon).
text.es: Estudia la roca (en el suelo al este del dragón verde).

text.en: Combat equipment method to kill three iron dragons (weak to water spells), Antifire potion or other means of dragonfire protection, Dragonkin Primer, 875 coins (unless you use a Dungeoneering cape to enter or have the hard Karamja achievements completed)
Travel to the iron/steel dragons in Brimhaven Dungeon.
text.es: Viaja hasta los dragones de hierro/acero en el Brimhaven Dungeon.

text.en: A quick method is using the Dungeoneering cape and selecting "Brimhaven metal dragon dungeon"
text.es: Un método rápido es usar la capa de Mazmorreo y seleccionar "Brimhaven metal dragon dungeon".

text.en: A slower method is walking west from the Karamja lodestone, entering the dungeon, and walking to the iron and steel dragons
text.es: Un método más lento es caminar hacia el oeste desde la piedra de viaje de Karamja, entrar en la mazmorra y caminar hasta los dragones de hierro y acero.

text.en: If you don't get the question about 'One of a Kind' go back to the entrance of the room and walk slowly into the room again.
text.es: Si no te aparece la pregunta sobre 'One of a Kind', vuelve a la entrada de la sala y entra de nuevo caminando despacio.

text.en: Kill 3 iron dragons.
text.es: Mata a 3 dragones de hierro.

text.en: Head to the west wall by the mysterious entrance to study the dragonkin writing.
text.es: Dirígete a la pared oeste, junto a la misteriosa entrada, para estudiar la escritura dragonkin.

text.en: Remora's necklace
Travel to the Grotworm Lair north-west of Port Sarim lodestone.
text.es: Viaja al Grotworm Lair, al noroeste de la piedra de viaje de Port Sarim.

text.en: Remora's necklace will take you directly outside of the portal.
text.es: El collar de Remora te llevará directamente fuera del portal.

text.en: Enter the bottom level of the Grotworm Lair. You can use the shortcut to the south-east of the first floor to get there quickly.
text.es: Entra en el nivel inferior del Grotworm Lair. Puedes usar el atajo al sureste de la primera planta para llegar rápido.

text.en: Investigate the summoning portal. The portal is right next to the shortcut, a square hole in the wall gleaming green.
text.es: Investiga el portal de invocación. El portal está justo al lado del atajo, un agujero cuadrado en la pared que brilla en verde.

text.en: Talk with Hannibus.
text.es: Habla con Hannibus.

chatOptions: 3 Your majesty - I have some questions.
1 I seek means to travel between worlds.

text.en: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet (if hard Morytania achievements is not complete or Big Book o' Piracy isn't used)
Ectophial to get to Port Phasmatys or Big Book o' Piracy, or Dungeoneering cape for Dragontooth Island teleport, antifire potion and food to survive fighting celestial dragons for 2 minutes
Travel to Dragontooth Island by talking to the ghost captain east of Port Phasmatys (south of those ships, in the small boat).
text.es: Viaja a Dragontooth Island hablando con el capitán fantasma al este de Port Phasmatys (al sur de esos barcos, en la barca pequeña).

chatOptions: 1 Please take me to Dragontooth Island.

text.en: The fastest method is teleporting to Dragontooth Island directly, using the Dungeoneering cape teleport, or using the elder divination outfit to teleport to the "Radiant Wisp Colony".
text.es: El método más rápido es teleportarse directamente a Dragontooth Island usando el teleporte de la capa de Mazmorreo, o usar el traje élder de Divinación para teleportarse a "Radiant Wisp Colony".

text.en: A quick method to Port Phasmatys is heading to Port Sarim and taking a charter ship to Port Phasmatys (talk to Trader Stan south-east of the lodestone).
text.es: Un método rápido para llegar a Port Phasmatys es ir a Port Sarim y coger un barco fletado hasta Port Phasmatys (habla con Trader Stan, al sureste de la piedra de viaje).

text.en: There are two ghost captains, you need to talk to the southern one who is standing next to a rowboat, not a ship.
text.es: Hay dos capitanes fantasma; debes hablar con el del sur, que está junto a una barca, no un barco.

text.en: Enter the mysterious entrance to the south.
text.es: Entra por la misteriosa entrada al sur.

text.en: Fight or tank a celestial dragon until Hannibus's bond reaches 100% (approximately 2 minutes).
text.es: Lucha contra un dragón celestial (o simplemente aguanta sus ataques) hasta que el vínculo de Hannibus alcance el 100% (unos 2 minutos).

text.en: Attack multiple to reach 100% faster.
text.es: Ataca a varios a la vez para llegar al 100% más rápido.

text.en: Talk to Hannibus again.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Hannibus.

text.en: Combat gear, food and potions to fight 3 dragon-hunters (Ranged/Magic/Melee)
Activate the Artefact north of Edgeville Monastery to meet with Hannibus in the King Black Dragon Lair.
text.es: Activa el Artefacto al norte del Edgeville Monastery para reunirte con Hannibus en el King Black Dragon Lair.

text.en: You will not enter a player-versus-player enabled area despite the warning.
text.es: No entrarás en una zona con JcJ activado a pesar de la advertencia.

text.en: Talk with the King Black Dragon.
text.es: Habla con el King Black Dragon.

text.en: Enter mysterious entrance.
text.es: Entra por la misteriosa entrada.

text.en: Talk with Therragorn.
text.es: Habla con Therragorn.

chatOptions: 1 Can you help Hannibus get home?

text.en: Kill the 3 dragon-hunters.
text.es: Mata a los 3 cazadores de dragones.

text.en: Talk to Hannibus for a cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Hannibus para ver una escena.

text.en: Kerapac will talk to you.
text.es: Kerapac hablará contigo.

text.en: Head into the far northern room. Kerapac will talk to you.
text.es: Dirígete a la sala más al norte. Kerapac hablará contigo.

chatOptions: 2 Just tell me what to do.

text.en: Harvest 25 dragonkin memories from the protoplasmic wisps and channel them into the cage.
text.es: Recolecta 25 recuerdos dragonkin de las volutas protoplasmáticas y canalízalos hacia la jaula.

text.en: Talk with Kerapac to fight Echo of Jas.
text.es: Habla con Kerapac para luchar contra el Echo of Jas.

text.en: Kill the Echo of Jas and then talk to it after you defeat it.
text.es: Mata al Echo of Jas y luego habla con él tras derrotarlo.

text.en: 5 free backpack spaces
Kerapac will talk to you.
text.es: Kerapac hablará contigo.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
